name: Rekindling the Ashened
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>灰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>復</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>燃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Place 1 of your "Ashened" cards that is banished or in your GY on the bottom of your Main Deck, except "Rekindling the Ashened", then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only activate 1 "Rekindling the Ashened" per turn.
eff: Place 1 of your "Ashened" cards that is banished or in your GY on the bottom of your Main Deck, except "Rekindling the Ashened", then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn. You can only activate 1 "Rekindling the Ashened" per turn.

action: Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck for cost
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
